creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 199430
patch for updating note to 1.3.26

- Updates to latest version 1.3.26.
  Changelog should be available at https://www.daemon.de/NoteDownload but it looks out of date (last changelog is for 1.3.6).

- Defines NO_ARCH as suggested by poudriere.

Tested successfully with portlint and poudriere (11.2-RELEASE i386/amd64).
